{{Infobox character
| name = Chethriss
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Chethriss]] is a [[Perfected]] known as [[the Perfected]] Blade.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Chethriss]] has dark [[emerald]] skin and neon green hair-cables.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Chethriss]] wields a sapphire [[force-blade]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
